'''鈭歴h-ch-sh-g''' ('''kashachshegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lojbanize|lojbanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lojbanize|lojbanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-ch-sh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kashachshegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishachshegoko|thishachshegoko]] || [[word:jishachshegoko|jishachshegoko]] || [[word:shishachshegoko|shishachshegoko]] || [[word:kishachshegoko|kishachshegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushachshegoko|thuthushachshegoko]] || [[word:jujushachshegoko|jujushachshegoko]] || [[word:shushushachshegoko|shushushachshegoko]] || [[word:kukushachshegoko|kukushachshegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushachshegoko|thushachshegoko]] || [[word:jushachshegoko|jushachshegoko]] || [[word:shushachshegoko|shushachshegoko]] || [[word:kushachshegoko|kushachshegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshachshegoko|thoshachshegoko]] || [[word:joshachshegoko|joshachshegoko]] || [[word:shoshachshegoko|shoshachshegoko]] || [[word:koshachshegoko|koshachshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shachshegoko|th忙shachshegoko]] || [[word:j忙shachshegoko|j忙shachshegoko]] || [[word:sh忙shachshegoko|sh忙shachshegoko]] || [[word:k忙shachshegoko|k忙shachshegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashachshegoko|thashachshegoko]] || [[word:jashachshegoko|jashachshegoko]] || [[word:shashachshegoko|shashachshegoko]] || [[word:kashachshegoko|kashachshegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashachshegoko|thashachshegoko]] || [[word:jashachshegoko|jashachshegoko]] || [[word:shashachshegoko|shashachshegoko]] || [[word:kashachshegoko|kashachshegoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
